name: Pressed Tofu Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the tofu and add it to a large pot of boiling water. Bring back to a boil and cook for 1 minute.
2. Drain the tofu through a colander lined with a clean dishtowel.
3. Run cold water over the tofu to cool it for easier handling. Twist the towel and press the tofu to expel excess water. Continue pressing until it has a firm, ground-beef-like texture; set aside.
4. Heat oil in a large skillet. Add onion, garlic, thyme, basil, celery seed, and sage. Sauté until onion is tender.
5. Add pressed tofu and sauté, stirring occasionally, for 5-10 minutes more. Stir in tamari, tomato paste, nutritional yeast, and water. Mix well.
6. Use this mix in casseroles, spaghetti sauces, chili, pizza toppings, etc. This freezes well and can be used in any recipe calling for ground beef.
